title: In Closed-Door Talks, U.S. Demands a Major Role in Greenland
summary_full: Greenlandic officials worry about the direction of the negotiations aimed at defusing President Trump’s threats to seize their island. But they have little leverage.
summary_public: Greenlandic officials worry about the direction of the negotiations aimed at defusing President Trump’s threats to seize their island. But they have little leverage.

GL.label: negative
GL.evidence: U.S. Demands a Major Role in Greenland
